author: MikelPlayz
name: CurrencyPlus
short: Two-currency system (Gold/Credit) with Google Sheets logging + import tools. Made for Abyss.
description: Tracks Gold/Credit balances, role-gated modifications, logs transactions to Google Sheets, supports importing from an existing sheet or CSV.
install_msg: Thanks for installing CurrencyPlus. Run /currencyset role, /currencyset creds, /currencyset gsheet, then use /currencyimport to migrate.
